documentation.content: A Cloud Function logged an ERROR. This includes the scheduled crons (autoAcknowledgeBills 03:00, dailyMembershipMaintenance 04:00, monthlyBillRun 06:00, staleCheckoutReminders 09:00, retryBillProcessing hourly, cleanupAbandonedCheckouts daily). Investigate in Cloud Logging / Error Reporting for the function `service_name` and the message. This alert exists so a silent failure — like the autoAcknowledgeBills FAILED_PRECONDITION that ran nightly unnoticed until a manual log check — pages someone instead of going undetected.

conditions.displayName: A Cloud Function logged ERROR or worse
